text.title: Substack vs Beehiiv vs ConvertKit vs Ghost Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether substack-beehiiv-pick applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is owned-audience priority ≥4 on the 1-5 scale?

branch.when: no AND revenue intent is paid sub
no AND revenue intent is sponsorship

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r2` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
